scenarios.name: find-rdp-exposed-on-aws-and-export-csv
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses api.count() to preview totals before consuming credits, api.search_cursor() for paginated retrieval, the org:"Amazon" port:3389 filter combination from the skill, and writes a CSV with the skill's exact fieldnames; baseline calls api.search without cursor or count preview.

scenarios.name: log4shell-facet-analysis
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses api.search(query, facets=[...]) with the vuln:CVE-2021-44228 filter and iterates result['facets'] for top org/country/port/product breakdowns; baseline iterates raw results and ignores Shodan's built-in facets API entirely.
